headline: Traveling to Iceland
body: Traveling to Iceland for two weeks. A group of friends and I went along the Ring Road to explore Iceland and hike.

headline: Graduated from Boston College
body: Completed my degree in Computer Science and Management at Boston College.

headline: Joined SciSure as Customer Service Associate
body: Started my position as a Customer Service Associate at SciSure.

headline: Returned from Paris
body: Ended my time studying abroad in Paris where I was able to drastically improve my French.

headline: Started Study Abroad in Paris
body: Began my time abroad in Paris.

headline: Stepped Down as Lead Route Setter
body: Concluded my role as Lead Route Setter at BC Campus Rec after over a year.

headline: Became Lead Route Setter at BC Campus Rec
body: Took on the Lead Route Setter role at Boston College Campus Recreation.
